reach_why: Combines known concerns; does not clearly introduce a fundamentally new mechanism beyond existing continual-learning and distribution-shift critiques.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links meta-overfitting, hidden task boundaries, scale-buffered interference, and ungrounded real-world structure into one failure story.
falsifiable_why: Test by comparing announced versus hidden shifts, benchmark-like versus alien shifts, and measuring diffuse post-adaptation interference.
explanation: Continual learning can seem robust yet fail when real changes are hidden, unfamiliar, and benchmark assumptions misguide adaptation.
